facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 977 reviews. At a gift shop.

LOCA - Night Market on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is not your average souvenir stop. Locals rate it nearly perfect, and the review count backs it up. If you're leaving Phu Quoc without picking up something worth keeping, you're doing it wrong.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the shelves at LOCA - Night Market. 977 people gave it 4.9 stars. You'll see exactly why in the first 10 seconds of this video.
